quiz.bannerSub: Answer 3 quick questions and we'll find your perfect India journey.
quiz.q1: What kind of journey calls to you?
quiz.q2: How many days do you have?
quiz.recHistoryShort: Delhi, Agra & Jaipur — India's most iconic 5-day circuit, perfectly paced.
quiz.recHistoryWeek: Jaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer & Udaipur — the full royal Rajasthan experience.
quiz.recHistoryExtended: Every fort, every palace, every sunset — the definitive Rajasthan journey.
quiz.recHistoryGrand: India's legendary luxury train — a grand royal journey across Rajasthan.
quiz.recNatureShort: Pristine coral atolls, crystal lagoons — India's most untouched islands.
quiz.recNatureWeek: Living root bridges, sacred forests, and the world's wettest place.
quiz.recNatureExtended: Houseboats, spice gardens, and God's Own Country at its finest.
quiz.recNatureGrand: Kaziranga, Gangtok, Shillong — India's last great wilderness frontier.
quiz.recSpiritualShort: Bodh Gaya, Sarnath & Kushinagar — the complete Buddhist pilgrimage circuit.
quiz.recSpiritualWeek: The magnificent Dravidian temples of Tamil Nadu in one stunning journey.
quiz.recSpiritualExtended: The Ganga Aarti, sacred ghats, and the spiritual soul of ancient India.
quiz.recSpiritualGrand: A deep Panchakarma wellness retreat in the birthplace of Ayurveda.
quiz.recAdventureShort: Rhododendron trails, river camps, and the Himalayan foothills in bloom.
quiz.recAdventureWeek: Pangong Lake, Nubra Valley, and the world's highest motorable roads.
quiz.recAdventureExtended: Ancient monasteries and dramatic Himalayan landscapes at high altitude.
quiz.recAdventureGrand: Tawang, Ziro Valley, and India's wildest northeastern frontier.
quiz.recLuxuryShort: Sun, heritage villas, and Goa at its most indulgent and relaxed.
quiz.recLuxuryWeek: Shikara rides on Dal Lake, tulip gardens, and Mughal masterpieces.
quiz.recLuxuryExtended: Tiger's Nest, Punakha Dzong, and the blissful Kingdom of Happiness.
quiz.recLuxuryGrand: India's most opulent luxury train — the ultimate grand experience.
